chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-6140 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For orders on office objection. 2) For hearing of Misc. No. 27222/2024. 3) For hearing of main case. 23.05.2025. Mr. Muhammad Ahmed Masood, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate for Respondent. ________________ Respondent’s Counsel has filed para-wise comments which are taken on record. Copy supplied to the Petitioner’s Counsel. To come up on 27.05.2025 along with C. P. No. D- 2045 of 2025 and other connected matters on the next date. Interim order passed earlier to continue till next date of hearing. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
